# EU AI Act Article 50 Cliff Clock — MEOK AI Labs | Free Embed

> Free embed: a 1-line JavaScript that shows the live countdown to the EU AI Act Article 50 cliff (2 August 2026). 49 days. Drop it in your site.

## Overview
EU AI Act Article 50 Cliff Clock — MEOK AI Labs | Free Embed is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
